# robots.txt for ytgrowth.io
# Search engines and AI assistants are welcome on public pages.
# App, auth, billing, admin and dashboard routes are off-limits.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /billing/
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard

# Search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /billing/
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard

Allow: /
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /billing/
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard

Allow: /
Disallow: /auth/

Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard

Allow: /
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /billing/
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /auth/

Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard

# Google's AI training crawler (Gemini, Bard)
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /billing/
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard

# Common Crawl (used by many LLM training datasets)
User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /api/

Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard
